headline: Light day with no meetings, emails, or Slack activity — use it to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) before the next bi-weekly TR cycle.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so dashboards are available for upcoming metrics reviews
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth failures); the Big Rock TR expects MBR dashboard-driven metrics and you'll be blind without them

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance the design doc for AE-1079: Generated evaluations without ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set which means it could slip silently; evals are a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock TR and adoption tracking depends on this

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock TR Confluence page and align your evals work to the 26.4 deliverables list
must_make_progress.why: The TR page references evals demos and key deliverables; ensure your design doc addresses what leadership expects

must_communicate_with.person_or_team: IT / DevOps (or whoever manages Salesforce & Snowflake credentials)
must_communicate_with.about: Both integrations are failing with auth errors — need credentials reset before next metrics pull
Align on the 'no ground truth' evaluation approach — get their input on feasibility and any ML-based scoring methods before locking the design doc

must_report_status.topic: Generated evaluations (no ground truth) design doc progress
must_report_status.to: Agents leadership (likely Adrian or Jordan based on TR structure)
must_report_status.note: Proactively share status since there's no due date set — don't let it become a surprise gap at the next bi-weekly TR

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations or high-priority cases
Snowflake integration is down (empty password) — no access to product telemetry or funnel metrics; March data update referenced in TR is at risk
AE-1079 has no due date — risk of drifting; consider setting a target date today
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the Big Rock TR — monitor whether evals work intersects with Autopilot reliability concerns

outcomes.business_impact: No concrete business impact captured yet today — priority is restoring visibility into escalations (Salesforce) and metrics (Snowflake) to prevent blind spots heading into the next TR cycle.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the key adoption-driving work item for generated evaluations.

slack_summary: Light day: no meetings, no emails, no Slack activity — ideal deep work window. Top priority: make significant progress on AE-1079 (generated evaluations without ground truth design doc) since evals are a key 26.4 deliverable. Second priority: get Salesforce and Snowflake credentials fixed — both integrations are broken, leaving you blind on escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today.
